ADMIN - Enum constant in enum class com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.entity.RoleType
 
AdminController - Class in com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.controller
Administrative controller responsible for ingesting data from external NASA APIs.

all() - Method in class com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.controller.UserController
Retrieves all users.
AnnotationController - Class in com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.controller
Handles annotation operations for items.

AnnotationEntity - Class in com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.entity
Represents a user-created annotation attached to a media item.

annotationId - Variable in class com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.dto.AnnotationResponse
Unique identifier of the annotation.
AnnotationMapper - Class in com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.mapper
Utility class responsible for converting Annotation objects between DTOs and entity models.
AnnotationRepository - Interface in com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.repository
Repository for managing AnnotationEntity persistence.
AnnotationRequest - Class in com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.dto
Request object used to create a new annotation.

AnnotationResponse - Class in com.mcconihay.nasamediaexplorer.dto
Response object representing an annotation.

Service responsible for managing annotations.

Default implementation of AnnotationService.
